name: constellation
description: Live multi-agent orchestration: WebSocket server + A2A messaging + dashboard + Stop hook helper + MCP server (full Phase 2 impl: WS proxy + 5 tools incl. a2a_wait_ack 3-tier + session-lifecycle + §13.13.2 dedup + chunked transfer reassembly). Bundles the v2.5.x reference runtime, the v2.5.3 SSoT-compliant gateway-client, the v0.4 MCP integration (§8), the v2.5.8 cross-environment Stop hook helper, the v2.5.10 attachment transport-mode (§13.11 rule 5), and the v2.5.11 at-least-once relay reliability (§13.13.2). v0.3.4 / Constellation v2.4.4 dashboard UI augment — 4 corner-anchored position presets (`.ws-pop.pos-{tl,tr,bl,br}` localStorage-backed; drag/resize end normalized to anchor edge-distance via `wsRectToAnchorPos`; legacy left/top WS_UI.pos auto-migrated; default 'br'); settings modal ⚙ (popup head 의 📂 우측) + 4 preset cards + anchor behavior description; fab right-click context menu (center / key-issue / key-manage / settings); fab z-index 60→58 so popup covers fab; arch-empty placeholder text + folder emoji 🗂→📂; header spacing compression (.ws-conn margin-bottom 12→8, .ws-h margin 4/7→0/0). v0.3.3 / Constellation v2.4.3 ships Ultrasafe A2A-intent family integration (§13.16.9 A2A-intent allowlist + 4-group classification table A2A-intent row + new §13.16.13 wire-spec sub-section): 5 new intent names (ULTRASAFE_FINDING per-attacker emit + ULTRASAFE_ITERATION_BOUNDARY ≥3-iteration boundary marker + ULTRASAFE_RELEASE_GATE publish-time gate state + SECURITY_DISCLOSURE_INTAKE external disclosure entry + MPCVD_COORDINATION Multi-Party Coordinated Vulnerability Disclosure) + dual-mode advisory/blocking ack_tier mapping (advisory v0.2.x = received-tier; blocking v0.3+ = decided-tier reusing Hyperbrief application-tier ladder) + cross-module integration (Hyperbrief paired DECISION_REQUEST on severity ≥ high + Greatpractice macro/mezzo entry candidate flow + Superscalar retire-barrier composition at iteration boundaries) + board-mirror render policy per intent (severity-colored finding cards + iteration timeline dividers + gate decision cards with §13.14 redaction for disclosure/MPCVD identifiers) + §13.16.12 Pattern 7 TEXT_MESSAGE fallback prefix support. Additive minor — wire compatible with v0.3.2 adopters (5 new names route via fail-safe-default-A2A-intent branch until allowlist update). v0.3.2 / Constellation v2.4.2 dashboard UI 통합 (setupWsCollab 별도 버튼 제거 → setupWsKeyMgmt 통합, 🔑 토글, kind radio ⬆/🏠/🔗 + 기본값 local + 라벨 포커스, UI5 모달 4 탭 + 이모지 통일 + 🔐 제목 + placeholder 즉시 렌더 + 폭 240→320 한 줄 fit). v0.3.1 / Constellation v2.4.1 extends KEY-MGMT (v0.3 additive: kind='upstream'|'collab'|'local' + roleDescription + local key wire-private file path / script call registration + UI kind dropdown + role textarea + UI5 modal chips). v0.3.0 / Constellation v2.4.0 first ships KEY-MGMT (WS-PROTOCOL-KEY-MGMT.md v0.2): 5 canonical messages (KeyIssue/KeyList/KeyRevoke/KeyLabel/AgentNameChanged) + 5-state machine (ISSUED→ACTIVE→REVOKED_PENDING→REVOKED→DELETED) + key.json atomic-write persistence + 14-day TTL + main-only permission gating + immediate/sessionEnd revocation modes + UI4 발급 패널 + UI5 키 관리 모달 (목록/revoke/label rename); RegisterUpstreamKey transitional alias retained. Plus v2.3.23 dashboard reference parity (upstream invite UI + onboarding md channel guide). Plugin v0.2.0 = Phase 2 production-ready (npm dep: ws ^8.18.0).
